manual_checks.title: Franz has productive access to FraWo and the required core collections
manual_checks.evidence: Prior MVP browser acceptance confirmed productive FraWo access and the required core collections for Franz.

manual_checks.title: Imported Vaultwarden entries are visible and usable in the UI for the MVP scope
manual_checks.evidence: Prior MVP browser acceptance confirmed the imported Vaultwarden MVP entries are visible and usable.

manual_checks.title: Wolf completed the productive login walkthrough for Vault, Nextcloud, Paperless and Odoo
manual_checks.evidence: Historical evidence only covers Vault and Nextcloud. Paperless and Odoo still need a fresh visible end-to-end walkthrough.

manual_checks.title: Franz completed the productive login walkthrough for Vault, Nextcloud, Paperless and Odoo
manual_checks.evidence: Historical evidence covers Vault and Nextcloud only. Paperless permissions and the full Odoo walkthrough still need fresh visible proof.

manual_checks.title: STRATO sending and receiving are visibly verified for webmaster, franz and noreply
manual_checks.evidence: webmaster and franz are technically verified for IMAP/SMTP AUTH. Visible send/receive proof for noreply is still open.

manual_checks.title: Franz Surface Laptop and iPhone have the required direct entrypoints and device-local rollout
manual_checks.evidence: Surface Control V1 is live and the shared Surface path is stable, but Franz Surface Laptop and iPhone are not yet visibly accepted as released devices.

manual_checks.title: Visible SMTP test mails succeeded for Nextcloud, Paperless and Odoo
manual_checks.evidence: Backend SMTP baseline is green for Nextcloud, Paperless and Odoo, but the visible end-user test mails are still outstanding.

manual_checks.title: Vaultwarden recovery material exists offline in two separate copies
manual_checks.evidence: No fresh proof yet that the Vaultwarden recovery material exists offline in two separate physical copies.

blocked_reasons: critical MVP manual evidence not green: wolf_login_walkthrough=pending
critical MVP manual evidence not green: franz_login_walkthrough=pending
critical MVP manual evidence not green: strato_mail_model_verified=pending
critical MVP manual evidence not green: device_rollout_verified=pending
critical MVP manual evidence not green: core_app_smtp_functional_test_verified=pending
critical MVP manual evidence not green: vaultwarden_recovery_material_verified=pending
scope_note: This gate covers the current business MVP only. It is separate from the public website release track and from the full internal production certification.
